title: [v4.0-rhel] vendor c/common@v0.47.5
body:
Update the login tests to reflect the latest changes to allow http{s}
prefixes (again) to address bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2062072.

Backport of commit 57cdc21b0057.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.0-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@TomSweeneyRedHat do you want to block this?
@rhatdan yes, until we get approval from RHEL mgmt.  @vrothberg in the meantime, can you spin one up on the v4.0-rhel branch too please?  That should be held also for the moment.

> @rhatdan yes, until we get approval from RHEL mgmt. @vrothberg in the meantime, can you spin one up on the v4.0-rhel branch too please? That should be held also for the moment.

This PR is for the `v4.0-rhel` branch :)
Ooops, too many PR @vrothberg .  Did you make one for the v4.0 branch then?  If not, please do.

Exceptions approved RHEL 8.6 BZ: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2066493  RHEL 9.0 BZ: [https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=206650](https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2066501)
